use std::sync::Arc;

struct DbPool {
    url: String,
}

impl DbPool {
    fn new(url: &str) -> Self {
        Self { url: url.to_string() }
    }

    fn query(&self, sql: &str) -> Vec<Row> {
        vec![]
    }
}

struct AppState {
    pool: Arc<DbPool>,
}

// GOOD: pool created once at startup, shared across all requests
fn build_app_state(db_url: &str) -> Arc<AppState> {
    let pool = Arc::new(DbPool::new(db_url));
    Arc::new(AppState { pool })
}

async fn handle_request(state: &AppState) -> Response {
    let rows = state.pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = true");
    build_response(rows)
}
